title: Metastelma roberti
taxonomy: Metastelma roberti belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is a type of flowering plant that is native to Mexico. The classification of Metastelma roberti is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, and family Apocynaceae. At the genus level, it is classified as Metastelma, while at the species level, it is classified as Metastelma roberti. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the plant kingdom.
uses: Metastelma roberti is a plant species with traditional medicinal uses in various cultures. The leaves and stems of the plant are used to treat various ailments, including fever and rheumatism. Further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of Metastelma roberti's medicinal uses.
